heading: Omitted
label: 564w Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized the Secretary of the Interior to implement education and training programs for tribe members, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 13, 1954, ch. 732, § 2668 Stat. 723
